name: Daily Calorie Calculator
desc: Calculate your daily calorie needs to maintain weight, lose fat or gain muscle.
seo_title: Daily Calorie Calculator – TDEE Online Free
seo_description: Calculate calorias_mantenimiento, para_adelgazar with our free daily calorie calculator (tdee). Just enter peso_kg, height_cm, edad and get results instantly.
result_context: The calories of maintenance represent the energy daily necessary; ajusta ±500 kcal to perder or ganar weight respectivamente.
formula_display: BMR = (10 × weight) + (6.25 × height) - (5 × edad) ± 5/161; TDEE = BMR × factor actividad
steps: Calculatete BMR using formula Mifflin-St Jeor according to género
Multiply BMR per factor of actividad correspondiente
To perder weight subtraction 500 kcal, to ganar sum 500 kcal
mistakes: Redondear edad or weight before of Calculatete (pierde precision in BMR)
Elegir nivel of actividad more high of the current (sobreestima necesidades)
Subtract more of 1000 kcal to perder weight (risk metabólico and rebote)
